title: Encyclia chondylobulbon
taxonomy: Encyclia chondylobulbon belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the Americas. It is classified within the genus Encyclia, which contains around 50 species of orchids. The plant is further classified into the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which includes various species of terrestrial and epiphytic orchids. Encyclia chondylobulbon is often found in tropical and subtropical regions and is prized for its showy flowers. Its classification into the Orchidaceae family reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations as a member of the orchid family.
